name: write_file
description: Writes text content to a file. If the file already exists, you must explicitly pass overwrite: true to replace it — otherwise the skill will refuse and return an error. Always confirm with the user before passing overwrite: true.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to write.

content.description: The full text content to write to the file.

overwrite.description: Set to true to allow overwriting an existing file. Defaults to false.
